use_cases: Displaying social media profile links on personal portfolio or resume websites
Adding creator social links to content creator platforms or landing pages
Including brand social links on SaaS product marketing pages
Showing contact/follow options on e-commerce brand storefronts
ai_summary: A flexible React card component that renders clickable social media links with customizable icons and styling. Supports multiple platforms including Instagram, Twitter/X, and Discord. Designed to showcase social presence across personal websites, portfolios, and product pages with configurable animation delays.
